description_long: This is a modern upholstered armchair featuring a vibrant blue and white floral pattern across its entire fabric surface. The chair has a gently curved backrest that wraps around to form integrated armrests, providing both comfort and support. Its seat is wide and cushioned, inviting for extended sitting, while the back and sides are slightly flared for a contemporary silhouette. The chair stands on four slender, straight legs made of dark-colored wood or metal, giving it a stable yet elegant appearance. The upholstery is smooth and tightly fitted, with no visible seams or buttons, emphasizing the bold floral motif. This chair would add a touch of artistic flair to any urban lounge, café, or waiting area.
description: A modern armchair with a blue and white floral upholstery, curved backrest, integrated armrests, and four dark slender legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide cushioned seat, curved backrest, and both armrests with the floral pattern prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's flared backrest and the depth of the seat, with one armrest visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous curve of the backrest and the floral pattern wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the chair's overall profile.
